title: codereview P1: inter-mesh Yggdrasil forwarding lacks MTU adjustment per spec MTU considerations in zt3c.3
close_reason: Fixed: MTU reduced to IPv6 minimum 1280 in mesh_to_upstream to account for Yggdrasil encapsulation overhead per spec; aligns with SCHC; 3 clean codereview passes with no remaining P0-P2; main bead zt3c.3 now ready for closure after verification
